text: Zoe Brown couldn't shake the feeling of being watched, a prickle of unease creeping up Zoe Brown's spine. When Zoe Brown turned to look, Zoe Brown caught a glimpse of a figure retreating into the darkness, leaving behind nothing but questions and a lingering sense of mystery.
context: This passage describes the aftermath of Zoe Brown's performance, where she experiences a feeling of being watched and sees a mysterious figure.
